title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Mayor, Honorable Caesar P. Perez to Enter Into and Sign a Memorandum of Agreement MOA, in Behalf of the Municipality of Los Baños with the Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) for the Grant of Lotto / Stl Charity Fund Share and the Grant of Calamity Assistance. ( AUTHOR : HON. GERONIMO A. CICERON, 09/14/2020)
